data.title: Implement rebase detection in review-complexity-classifier.sh
data.description:
## Description

Extend _is_merge_commit() function (~line 441) in plugins/dso/scripts/review-complexity-classifier.sh to also detect REBASE_HEAD state. Add MOCK_REBASE_HEAD env var support matching existing MOCK_MERGE_HEAD pattern (line 442-443). When REBASE_HEAD is present, _is_merge_commit() returns true (reusing existing field, NOT adding a new is_rebase_commit field). This causes IS_MERGE=true which triggers _compute_size_action() bypass (size_action: none), matching existing merge commit behavior.

Use git rev-parse --git-dir for per-worktree REBASE_HEAD path.

## TDD Requirement
The RED test from task 1bf5-9563 turns GREEN: is_merge_commit == true when MOCK_REBASE_HEAD=1.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/scripts/review-complexity-classifier.sh (modify)
- .test-index (modify — remove RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] REBASE_HEAD detection in review-complexity-classifier.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'REBASE_HEAD' plugins/dso/scripts/review-complexity-classifier.sh
- [ ] MOCK_REBASE_HEAD env var support
  Verify: grep -q 'MOCK_REBASE_HEAD' plugins/dso/scripts/review-complexity-classifier.sh
- [ ] .test-index RED marker removed
  Verify: ! grep -q 'review-complexity-classifier.*\[test_classifier_detects_rebase' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
